name: Utage Restaurant & Lounge
tagline: Family-run Okinawan restaurant in Kalihi that literally calls regulars when specials are coming — 25 years of that kind of aloha.
mustOrder: konbu maki — only made twice a year, ask when the next one is
daily specials — whatever the kitchen is excited about
parking: City Square Shopping Center lot on Kalani St
talkStory: Run by the Kishimoto family since 2001 — daughter Edna handles front of house, son Ivan runs the kitchen. They keep a handwritten call list of regulars and phone them when favorite specials are available. That detail alone tells you everything about this place. Okinawan and Japanese cuisine in Kalihi's City Square Shopping Center, far from any tourist path. The ahi nori tempura is the signature. Konbu maki is only made twice a year — ask when the next batch is coming.
